author: Haroen Viaene
subject: ci(circle): Travis → Circle (#3643)
body:
* ci(circle): initial setup

not done yet: re-enable functional tests as they were on Circle, but if I understand it correctly, they didn't work.

* ci(circle): limit jest to 4 workers

* ci(functional): remove the functional tests

They haven't functioned recently, and were not a stack we are comfortable with

* ci(functional): remove running

* chore(functional): remove deps

* ci(circle): correct working directory

* Update .circleci/config.yml

Co-Authored-By: francoischalifour < francoischalifour@users.noreply.github.com>
